home.bannerAlt: Green nature — symbol of sustainable development and welfare
home.commitmentBody: Hilful Fuzul Manobkallyan Organisation stands with the poor and needy of Taleratal.

commitment.intro: We keep every donation and expense open to the public. The executive committee oversees the fund; donors can verify via the transparency page and receipts.

transparency.title: Full transparency
transparency.description: Published donations and expenses appear in the public ledger.

committee.title: Committee oversight
committee.description: Chair, secretary, and cashier manage accounts together.

receipts.title: Digital receipts
receipts.description: Verify manual donations by receipt number.

local.title: Local welfare
local.description: Direct service to the poor and needy of Taleratal village.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From donation to published accounts — accountability at every step.

donate.title: 1. Donate
donate.description: Donors contribute in cash or online to the fund.

record.title: 2. Record
record.description: The cashier logs each donation in a separate register.

approve.title: 3. Approve
approve.description: The committee reviews and approves expenses and programmes.

publish.title: 4. Publish
publish.description: Accounts are published on the transparency page; verify with receipts.

governance.title: Governance & legal basis
governance.subtitle: Formed on 24 April 2026 at Taleratal Jame Mosque; the committee manages the fund.

activitiesSnapshot.title: Programme areas
activitiesSnapshot.subtitle: Religious education, financial aid, healthcare, and community development — see the activities page.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Common questions about donations, accounts, and the fund.

whereMoney.a: Donations are deposited into the fund and spent only for public welfare in Taleratal — aid, education, healthcare, and community development.

seeAccounts.q: Where can I see the accounts?
seeAccounts.a: The transparency page shows published donations and expenses. The home page also shows total donations, expenses, and current balance.

receipt.q: How do I get a receipt?
receipt.a: For manual donations, use the receipt number on the receipt verification page. Online verification will be linked here when active.

oversight.a: The executive committee (chair, secretary, cashier) and advisory council provide oversight. Accounts are presented at monthly meetings.

annualReport.q: When is the annual report available?
annualReport.a: A yearly income–expense summary will be published on the annual report page. Download links will appear after publication.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: All donations, expenses, and ledger entries will remain open to the public.

activities.title: Activities
activities.description: Ongoing aid, education, healthcare, and community development programmes will appear here.

annualReport.title: Annual report
annualReport.description: Yearly income–expense summary and document downloads.

notices.title: Notices
notices.description: Meetings, programmes, and important announcements will be published here.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: Hilful Fuzul Manobkallyan Organisation — a non-political, welfare body serving vulnerable people in Taleratal village.
about.imageAlt: Nature and community welfare — illustrative image
about.body: On Friday, 24 April 2026, an emergency meeting at Taleratal Jame Mosque unanimously established “Hilful Fuzul Manobkallyan Organisation” to stand beside the poor and needy of the village. An executive committee and advisory council were formed to carry out social welfare work.

formation.chair: Chair: Mawlana Md. A. Kadir (Imam & Khatib, Taleratal Jame Mosque)

objectives.religious: Religious reform & model society: Quran study circles and religious programmes to draw people to the mosque and build an exemplary community in Taleratal.
objectives.poverty: Poverty alleviation: sustainable plans to remove poverty and harmful superstitions and support social uplift.
objectives.justice: Social justice: resist injustice, oppression and immoral conduct with community solidarity.
objectives.humanity: Humanitarian service: support needy families, marriage assistance, and medical aid from the fund.
objectives.education: Education: arrange religious and Quranic education for elderly villagers.
objectives.transparency: Financial transparency: keep separate registers for all donations and expenses, presented at monthly meetings.

policies.nonRefundable: All grants are non-refundable and spent only for public welfare.
policies.membership: Residents of Taleratal and donor members are general members of the organisation.

resolutionPrint.hint: Press Ctrl+P (⌘+P on Mac), or use the button below. Choose Save as PDF as the print destination to download.
resolutionPrint.footer: Taleratal Jame Mosque — 24 April 2026: meeting minutes and final resolution (Hilful Fuzul Manobkallyan Fund).

receipt.title: Receipt verification
receipt.subtitle: On this page, donation information can be verified by receipt number.
receipt.inputHint: Enter the full receipt number to verify. For suggestions, type at least 4 characters (e.g. HF-1A2B).
receipt.searchError: Could not search right now. Please try again.
receipt.noResults: No published receipt matches this number or filter.
receipt.notConfigured: Live verification is unavailable — Supabase anon key and migration required (see supabase/README.md).
receipt.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a minute.
receipt.verifiedNote: This donation is verified from published records.
receipt.pendingBody: When online verification is available, donor name, date, amount, and receipt links will appear here.
